description: The 'Studies' page is loaded, showing a dashboard with a sidebar on the left and a table of existing research studies in the main content area.
frame_description: A dashboard view with a sidebar on the left and a main content area showing a list of studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, and dates.

description: User hovers over the 'Closing date' column header.
User hovers over the 'Title' column header.
User hovers over the study title 'Un-moderated US discovery'.
User hovers over the '+ Create' button.
User clicks the '+ Create' button.
A dropdown menu opens showing different types of studies that can be created.
frame_description: A dropdown menu is visible below the Create button with options like Interview study, Unmoderated study, and Participant recruitment.

description: User hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu.
User clicks 'Interview study'.
Navigation to the study setup page.
The 'Study title' step of the setup process is displayed.
frame_description: The screen shows a 'Study title' input field with pre-filled text and a 'Next' button.

description: User clicks into the 'Study title' input field.
User types 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the study title field.
User hovers over the 'Next' button.
User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is activated, and a red click indicator appears.

description: A loading spinner appears in the center of the screen.
frame_description: The screen content is replaced by a white background with a central loading spinner.

description: The page transitions to the 'Research method' step, showing options for Video Call, In-person, etc.
frame_description: The screen updates to show 'How will you be conducting your research?' with several card options for different research methods.

description: Navigation to the Research Method step.
frame_description: The 'How will you be conducting your research?' page loads, showing various moderated and unmoderated research options.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Video Call' research method card.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Video Call' option under the Moderated section.

description: User selects the 'Video Call' research method.
frame_description: The 'Video Call' card is clicked, and its border turns blue to indicate selection.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button at the bottom left of the main content area.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the Device requirements step.
frame_description: The 'Device requirements' page loads, with 'Any device' selected by default.

description: Navigation to the Tool selection step.
frame_description: The screen shows a loading state before the 'Which tool will you use to conduct the remote research?' page appears.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'I want to use a third party tool' link.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The cursor is over the text link below the main tool description.

description: User clicks 'I want to use a third party tool'.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The link is clicked.

description: The UI expands to reveal third-party tool options (Zoom, Lookback, etc.).
frame_description: A grid of third-party tool logos appears below the link.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button at the bottom of the Tool page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the Quota step.
frame_description: The 'Quota' page loads, asking 'How many participants do you need?' with a default value of 12.

description: Cursor hovers over the participant count input field.
frame_description: The cursor is over the input field containing the number '12'.

description: User clicks into the participant count input field.
frame_description: The input field is focused for editing.

description: User changes the participant quota from 12 to 5.
frame_description: The user clears the field and types '5'.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button below the quota input.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the Session format step.
frame_description: The 'Session format' page loads, with 'Individual Interviews' selected by default.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button below the session format options.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: The 'Next' button is clicked.

description: Navigation to the Session duration step.
frame_description: The 'Session duration' page loads, with '45 mins' selected by default.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Hand picking' participant selection card.
frame_description: The cursor remains over the 'Hand picking' card until the end of the segment.

description: Hovering over participant selection options 'Hand picking' and 'Automated'.
frame_description: The 'Participant selection' step of the study setup is visible, showing two large cards for 'Hand picking' and 'Automated' selection methods.

description: Clicking the 'Next' button on the Participant selection page.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button at the bottom left of the main content area.

description: Navigating to the Panel sourcing page.
frame_description: The page content changes to show sourcing options: 'Askable Panel' and 'Send a link to your list'.

description: Hovering over sourcing options 'Askable Panel' and 'Send a link to your list'.
frame_description: The 'Panel' sourcing page is displayed with two primary options for finding participants.

description: Clicking the 'Next' button on the Panel sourcing page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Next' button below the sourcing options.

description: Navigating to the Participant location page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Participant location' setup page.

description: Map and location input field render on the page.
frame_description: A map of Australia and a location search input field appear on the page.

description: Hovering over the location search input field.
interaction_target: Type to add more participant locations
frame_description: The cursor is inside the location search box which contains the placeholder text 'Type to add more participant locations'.

description: Typing 'United states' into the location search box.
interaction_target: Type to add more participant locations
frame_description: The text 'United states' appears in the location search box.

description: Location autocomplete dropdown appears.
frame_description: A dropdown list of suggested locations, including 'United States', is visible below the search box.

description: Selecting 'United States' from the location suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'United States' option in the dropdown menu.

description: 'United States' added to the location list; map updates.
frame_description: The location list now shows 'Australia' and 'United States'. The map view has adjusted.

description: Hovering over the 'Delete' button for Australia.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Delete' button on the right side of the 'Australia' location row.

description: Clicking the 'Delete' button for Australia.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Delete' button next to 'Australia'.

description: 'Australia' removed from the location list; map updates.
frame_description: Only 'United States' remains in the location list. The map now shows North America.

description: Hovering over the 'Next' button on the Participant location page.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Next' button.

description: Clicking the 'Next' button on the Participant location page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.

description: Navigating to the Demographic filters page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Demographic filters' page.

description: Clicking the exclusion period dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks on the dropdown field currently showing 'In the last 3 months'.

description: Exclusion period dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: A list of options like 'In the last 1 month', 'In the last 6 months', etc., appears.

description: Hovering over exclusion period options in the dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the different time period options in the open menu.

description: Clicking the 'Next' button on the Demographic filters page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom left.

description: Navigating to the Custom screener page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Custom screener' page.

description: Clicking the 'Add a custom screening question' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the large button in the center of the page.

description: Question type selection menu appears.
frame_description: A small menu with options 'Multiple choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study' appears.

description: Hovering over the 'Multiple choice' question type option.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Multiple choice' item in the menu.

description: Selecting 'Multiple choice' from the question type menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on 'Multiple choice' in the menu.

description: User pauses with the cursor in the question input field before typing.
frame_description: Multiple Choice modal is open, cursor is active in the question input field.

description: User types: 'Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?'
frame_description: The text of the question is being entered into the 'Screener question' input field.

description: User clicks into the first answer input field.
frame_description: User clicks into the input field labeled 'Answer 1...'

description: User types: 'I don't use them at all'
frame_description: The first answer option is entered into the input field.

description: User clicks into the second answer input field.
frame_description: User clicks into the input field labeled 'Answer 2...'

description: User types: 'I use them a few times per week'
frame_description: The second answer option is entered into the input field.

description: User clicks into the third answer input field.
frame_description: User clicks into the input field labeled 'Answer 3...'

description: User clicks into the fourth answer input field.
frame_description: User clicks into the input field labeled 'Answer 4...'

description: User types: 'I use them multiple times per day'
frame_description: The fourth answer option is entered into the input field.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button in the modal.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The question modal closes and the new question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, and the 'Custom screener' page is visible with the new question listed.

description: Navigation to the Timezone selection page.
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Your Timezone' section.

description: User clicks 'Audience' in the left sidebar.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Audience' link in the navigation sidebar.

description: Navigation back to the custom screener page.
frame_description: The page content changes back to the screener question list.

description: User hovers over the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: Cursor lingers over the button to add a new question.

description: User clicks 'Copy from other study' in the dropdown.
frame_description: The user selects the option to copy a question from a previous study.

description: 'Select a study to copy from' modal appears with a loading spinner.
frame_description: A modal window appears with a centered loading animation.

description: The list of studies loads and becomes visible in the modal.
frame_description: The loading spinner is replaced by a list of studies with their status and dates.

description: User clicks the close button on the modal.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'X' icon in the top right corner of the modal.

description: The study selection modal closes.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the 'Custom screener' page again.

description: User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to open the question type dropdown.

description: User hovers over the 'Short answer' option.
frame_description: The dropdown is open and 'Short answer' is highlighted by the cursor.

description: The 'Short answer' question configuration modal appears.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Short answer' is now visible.

description: User types: 'What is the name of your favourite TV show?'
frame_description: The question text is being entered into the input field in the modal.

description: Hover over 'Save' button in modal
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Save' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: Click 'Save' button to add question
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button.

description: Modal closes and question is added to the list
frame_description: The modal disappears, returning the user to the 'Custom screener' page where the new question is now listed.

description: Click '+ Add another custom question'
frame_description: The user clicks the link to open the question type selection menu again.

description: Question type selection dropdown appears
frame_description: A small menu with options like 'Multiple choice' and 'Short answer' appears below the click target.

description: Click on 'Multiple choice' question type
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Multiple choice' option in the dropdown.

description: 'Multiple Choice' question configuration modal appears
frame_description: A modal overlay titled 'Multiple Choice' is now visible.

description: Type screener question: 'Which TV streaming service are you using most right now?'
frame_description: The user types into the 'Screener question' field in the modal.

description: Type answer option 1: 'Netflix'
frame_description: The user types 'Netflix' into the first answer field.

description: Type answer option 3: 'Disney+'
frame_description: The user types 'Disney+' into the third answer field.

description: Type answer option 4: 'Prime Video'
frame_description: The user types 'Prime Video' into the fourth answer field.

description: Click 'Save' button to add question
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button in the modal.

description: Modal closes and question is added to the list
frame_description: The modal disappears and the 'Custom screener' list updates with the new question.

description: Hover over the 'Short Answer' question block
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the first question card in the list.

description: Click on 'Additional Info' in the left sidebar
frame_description: The user is on the custom screener setup page and clicks the 'Additional Info' link in the sidebar.

description: Navigate to Your Timezone page
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Your Timezone' configuration section.

description: Type 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' into the Short description field
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
frame_description: The user types text into the provided text area.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the description page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Navigate to Additional Instructions page
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Additional instructions for confirmed participants' section.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the additional instructions page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button.

description: Navigate to Contacts page
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Contacts' section.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the contacts page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button.

description: Navigate to Legal & Privacy page
frame_description: The page content updates to show the 'Legal & Privacy' section.

description: Click on calendar to add session at 9:00am on Wednesday 25th
frame_description: The user clicks on the 9:00am slot under Wednesday 25th.

description: Session block 9:00am - 9:45am appears on calendar
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar grid.

description: Click on calendar to add session at 11:00am on Wednesday 25th
frame_description: The user clicks on the 11:00am slot under Wednesday 25th.

description: Session block 11:00am - 11:45am appears on calendar
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar grid.

description: Click on calendar to add session at 2:00pm on Wednesday 25th
frame_description: The user clicks on the 2:00pm slot under Wednesday 25th.

description: Session block 2:00pm - 2:45pm appears on calendar
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar grid.

description: Click on calendar to add session at 9:00am on Thursday 26th
frame_description: The user clicks on the 9:00am slot under Thursday 26th.

description: Session block 9:00am - 9:45am appears on calendar
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar grid.

description: Click on calendar to add session at 11:00am on Thursday 26th
frame_description: The user clicks on the 11:00am slot under Thursday 26th.

description: Session block 11:00am - 11:45am appears on calendar
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar grid.

description: Click on calendar to add session at 2:00pm on Thursday 26th
frame_description: The user clicks on the 2:00pm slot under Thursday 26th.

description: Session block 2:00pm - 2:45pm appears on calendar
frame_description: A blue session block appears on the calendar grid.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the calendar page
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Next' button in the sidebar.

description: Navigate to Review & Submit page
frame_description: The page content updates to show a summary of the study setup for final review.

description: Click the 'Submit study' button
frame_description: The user clicks the black 'Submit study' button at the bottom of the review page.

description: Navigate to Participants page
frame_description: The page content updates to show the participants list for the newly created study.

description: Click on 'Settings' in the top navigation bar
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Settings' link in the top menu.

description: Navigate to Settings page
frame_description: The page content updates to show the study's configuration settings.
